description: Product Description 200 Latex Water Balloon Bombs 200 Pack Water Balloons with filler nozzle. Water balloon bombs that are ideal for garden fights in the summer are made of 100% natural latex. No foul odors or chemically powder coatings. Pre-fill the night before your water balloon fight without them popping or leaking overnight. Pack contains 200 water balloons. Our water balloons are multi-color, includes blue, green, yellow, pink, purple, red and orange. Our water balloons are fun and safe, they are perfect for kids and adults when you have water fights, sports activities, family games, party favors etc. GREAT SAFE MATERIALS: Water bombs are made of natural latex material, which are safe and non-toxic, with good quality and without any chemical powder coating or odor. GREAT VALUE WATER BOMBS: Each pack comes with 200 latex water bombs. ✔ Size of single balloon maximum (with water): 10cm x 5cm ✔ Size of single balloon (without water): 5cm x 2cm.
